code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 32
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 32
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_num
        let doubled = sign * val * 2
        if first
          result = "#{doubled}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let doubled = sign * val * 2
    if first
      result = "#{doubled}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  process(line)
when None
  println("")
end
